_scaffold: PARTIAL (Phase 3 wired the MECHANICS onto a still-placeholder room). Functional now: Pike the prospector (buy the rope / take his deal / kill him for it), 2 canyon critters for the fight-out beat, and the grappling-hook-GATED climb-out to Downtown. The GEOMETRY is Caelan's to hand-author — the real canyon (the wrecked car, Pike's sunken covered wagon, ledges, and the Phase-5 GRAPPLE_ANCHOR that replaces this plain hook-gated exit with an actual swing).

enemies.name: Pike
barks: [Pike: The river took my years. Left me all this patience.]
enemies.adjacencyBark: [Pike: Buyin' the rope, or just gawkin'? Press E.]

examinables.text: [Your car, folded around a boulder — a total write-off. Half-buried in the old silt beside it: the ribs of a COVERED WAGON, and a grizzled man perched on a rock like he grew there.]

transitions.label: [You sink the hook into the rockface and haul yourself up — out of the canyon, toward Downtown.]
transitions.requiresMsg: [Sheer rock, straight up. You'd need a good hook and a rope to climb out of this pit — and Pike has one.]
